Parent guide · 2025

10-point checklist for parents choosing a girls PG in Sambhajinagar

Choosing the right PG accommodation for your daughter in Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar is a decision that affects her safety, academic performance, and overall wellbeing for months or years. This checklist distils the most important factors parents should evaluate before finalising any PG — whether near Deogiri College, DIEMS, Osmanpura coaching hubs, or elsewhere in the city.

1

Female warden on-site 24x7

A female warden who lives on the premises — not just visits — is the single most important safety factor. Ask whether the warden is resident or visiting, and what her shift schedule is.

2

CCTV in all common areas

CCTV cameras in corridors, stairwells, the entrance, and common rooms are non-negotiable. Ask to see the footage interface during your visit to verify it is live and recorded.

3

Walking distance from college or coaching

A PG within 1 km of your daughter's college or coaching institute saves 30–60 minutes daily, reduces transport costs, and eliminates late-night travel risk. Jyoti Girls PG is 0.8 km from Deogiri College.

4

Transparent, all-inclusive pricing

Ask for a written breakdown of what is included. Hidden charges for electricity, laundry, or maintenance are common. Jyoti Girls PG charges ₹2,999–₹5,000/month with no hidden fees.

5

Proper beds — no bunk beds

Bunk beds signal overcrowding and poor sleep hygiene. Verify that the PG provides proper single beds, a personal wardrobe, and a study desk for each resident.

6

Power backup and high-speed Wi-Fi

Frequent power cuts and slow internet directly impact study quality. Confirm 24x7 power backup and ask for the Wi-Fi speed and router setup before deciding.

7

Clear visitor and curfew policy

A written curfew policy with defined timings, visitor log, and guardian notification system protects your daughter. Ask for the policy document during your visit.

8

Parent communication system

The PG should have a mechanism to notify parents of late arrivals, illness, or any unusual events. Regular weekly updates — even brief ones — are a sign of professional management.

9

Hygienic washrooms and common areas

Visit during a weekday, not just on a scheduled tour. Inspect washrooms, the kitchen area (if meals are served), and the passageways. Daily cleaning logs should be visible.

10

Talk to current residents and parents

Ask the PG management for references. A credible PG will connect you with current residents or their parents who are willing to share their experience. Jyoti Girls PG provides references on request.

How Jyoti Girls PG scores on this checklist

Jyoti Girls PG in Jyoti Nagar, Osmanpura fulfils all 10 points. Our resident female warden is on-site 24x7, CCTV covers all common areas, we are 0.8 km from Deogiri College, pricing starts at ₹2,999/month with no hidden charges, all rooms have proper single beds, power backup and Wi-Fi are uninterrupted, and we maintain a documented visitor and curfew policy.

We welcome parent visits on any weekday. Call or WhatsApp us to schedule a walkthrough before you finalise your decision.

Jyoti Girls PG scores 10/10
